benchmark_questions: Which subsystems dominate the framework architecture and why?
Where are request lifecycle, ORM, migration, auth, session, admin, and template responsibilities separated?
Which files would a senior engineer inspect first before modifying query execution or request handling?
Can the memory layer preserve pinned repo facts, source_refs, private notes, and compression traces under a tight packet budget?
